notes._about: Frozen scoring baselines for the bench harness (spec H7 register). judge_pin/adjudicator_pin are resolved once by resolve_judge_pin(); score_run() refuses to run while judge_pin is null. Read-only to any optimizing loop.
notes.noise_rate_se_extension_criterion: RESEARCH_PENDING: extend baseline N=3 -> N=5 if noise-rate SE at N=3 > 2pp (artifact 32).
notes.subset_full_tracking_acceptance: RESEARCH_PENDING: default is rank-order preserved on the full-50 pass with no bucket inverting by >1 SD (artifact 32).
notes.power_analysis_subset_size: RESEARCH_PENDING: power-analysis refinement of the 15-PR subset size (artifact 32).
notes.delta_noise: RESEARCH_PENDING: owner pins delta_noise from measured v2 noise mean+SD after the baseline pass (spec H6).
notes.judge_pin_resolution: Resolved 2026-07-17: spec Q7 asked for the Opus 4.8 DATED snapshot; the models API exposes claude-opus-4-8 only as an undated alias (models list verified complete, has_more=false; newest dated Opus ids: claude-opus-4-5-20251101, claude-opus-4-1-20250805). Pinned the literal alias per the spec-wins/log-discrepancy rule. Owner may override to a dated id before the Task 18 freeze; re-judge cost ~USD10, caches are pin-keyed.
